case_title: ABELSON, MARK B. et al vs. CHANES, SHELDON et al

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABELSON, MARK B. ABELSON, JANET W. AS TO DEFENDANT CHANES, SHELDON GOLDEN GATE JUICE COMPANY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABELSON, MARK B. ABELSON, JANET W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANES, SHELDON GOLDEN GATE JUICE COMPANY $7,516.45 PRINCIPAL, $6,884.84 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,401.29, THE AMOUNTS CALLED FOR IN ITEMS A-H ARE DIFFERENT FOR EACH DEBTOR: AS TO DEFENDANT SHELDON CANES, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $26,997.70 (INCLUDING PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF $14064.00, AND INTEREST AMOUNT OF $12933.70). ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
